title: Robust Route Optimiser (RRO)
description: State-dependent multimodal routing framework for robust travel decisions on the Haßlinghausen → Freiburg (Breisgau) corridor. Treats the transport graph as state-dependent (topology changes with weather, infrastructure, and disruptions), searches for a portfolio of strategies rather than a single best route, and architecturally separates forecast robustness from decision robustness.
